headline: 今日AI速览：学术研究最活跃
narrative:
今日共收录291篇AI新闻，分类分布：学术研究206篇, 开源项目40篇, 模型发布34篇, 产品/API11篇。热门标签：Agent（65篇）。其中14%的文章有多来源交叉验证。

▸ chopratejas /headroom：Compress tool outputs, logs, files, and RAG chunks before they reach the LLM. 60-95% fewer tokens, s

▸ affaan-m /ECC：The agent harness performance optimization system. Skills, instincts, memory, security, and research

▸ aquasecurity /trivy：Find vulnerabilities, misconfigurations, secrets, SBOM in containers, Kubernetes, code repositories,

▸ NousResearch /hermes-agent：The agent that grows with you

▸ nesquena /hermes-webui：Hermes WebUI: The best way to use Hermes Agent from the web or from your phone!
text: 今日共收录291篇AI新闻，分类分布：学术研究206篇, 开源项目40篇, 模型发布34篇, 产品/API11篇。热门标签：Agent（65篇）。其中14%的文章有多来源交叉验证。
